thesis.core_idea: AI-driven travel tech platform with strong profitability and margin expansion, bolstered by strategic Sojern acquisition positioned to benefit from digital transformation in travel and hospitality globally
thesis.growth_driver: FY25 PAT grew 44% YoY; Sojern acquisition adds $80M+ revenue; AI-first strategy capturing market share in channel management and dynamic pricing
thesis.edge: Best-in-class EBITDA margins at 23.2% in Q4FY25; nearly debt-free balance sheet at 0.82% debt-to-equity; recurring SaaS revenue model with global customer base
thesis.trigger: Sojern integration completion; FY26 revenue guidance upgrade post-acquisition; margin expansion from AI monetization; market re-rating as acquisition synergies materialize

valuation.margin_of_safety: Moderate; current price 26% below lower bound indicates oversold conditions

timing.price_vs_200dma: Below 200dma; stock down 30% from entry; oversold technical setup

capital_efficiency.roic_trend: Improving; Q4FY25 EBITDA margin expanded to 23.2%; ROCE estimated 28-32%
capital_efficiency.reinvestment_quality: High; strategic M&A deployment into high-margin SaaS; organic R&D investment in AI products

structural_risks: Competition from global travel tech players
cyclical_risks: FX headwinds from USD revenue exposure
company_risks: Product transition risk during AI rollout
Margin compression if integration costs exceed guidance

next_triggers: Sojern integration updates and synergy realization through FY26
key_metrics: EBITDA margin trend targeting 24%+ by FY26
Free cash flow generation and conversion

data_sources: RateGain Q4FY25 earnings release: 43.7% PAT growth, 23.2% EBITDA margin
Screener.in: 0.82% debt-to-equity ratio, 80.5% CAGR 5-year profit growth
Economic Times / MediaNama: Sojern acquisition November 2025 for $250M, FY26 guidance raised
Portfolio input: Current price 485.9, entry price 700.16, position down 30%
